backend/ingredient-store.mo: Defines ingredient data structures (SkinType, IngredientSafety, IngredientInfo) and provides a Map-based store with functions to add, retrieve, and list all ingredients.
backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing the skincare analysis backend with user profiles, questionnaire results, product recommendations, ingredient analysis, favorites, routines, product notes, and access control using MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining OldActor and NewActor types with identical structures for state preservation during canister upgrades, currently implementing a no-op migration.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and configuration files describing their functionality and styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining comprehensive design tokens for colors, borders, and UI elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SkinCare Analyzer application with html2pdf.js CDN integration for PDF export functionality.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with 14 routes (landing, questionnaire, results, dashboard, favorites, routines, comparison, resources, journal, ingredients, product checker, DBMS docs) and ProfileSetupModal for new users.
Component displaying user's skin analysis history as cards with skin type badges, timestamps, and color-coded concern level indicators with icons.
frontend/src/components/ArticleCard.tsx: Displays an educational article as a clickable card with category badge, title, and description preview; opens a dialog with full article content when clicked.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Protects routes by checking Internet Identity authentication status; shows loading spinner during initialization and login prompt for unauthenticated users.
Displays a grid of skincare product cards with ingredient compatibility indicators and a summary table showing which ingredients are compatible across products.
frontend/src/components/ConnectivityCode: Tabbed interface showing code examples for actor initialization, authentication, query hooks, mutations, error handling, and loading states with copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/DataFlo: Visualizes the application's data flow architecture from UI components through React Query, actor layer, Motoko backend, to stable storage. Includes detailed authentication flow documentation.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/ERDiagr: Displays entity-relationship diagram with legend, entity descriptions, and key relationship documentation for the database schema including User, Product, Ingredient, Routine, and related entities.
Displays a legend card explaining ER diagram notation symbols (entity rectangles, attribute ovals, relationship diamonds, and cardinality markers) with visual examples and emerald/teal styling.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/SchemaD: Renders a database schema diagram image and displays detailed schema information for 8 tables (users, skin_type_results, products, ingredients, product_ingredients, favorites, routines, routine_steps) using SchemaTable components.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/SchemaT: Displays a single database table schema in a card format, showing column names, types, and constraints with icons for primary keys and foreign keys, with special styling for junction tables.
frontend/src/components/ExportButton.tsx: Button component that fetches user profile, analysis history, routines, favorites, and notes, then generates and prints an HTML export of results or dashboard data.
frontend/src/components/IngredientAnalys: Allows users to input comma-separated ingredients for analysis; displays safety classifications, scores, and detailed information for each ingredient with color-coded badges.
frontend/src/components/IngredientCard.t: Displays an ingredient as a card with safety classification badge and concern indicators; opens a detail modal when clicked.
frontend/src/components/IngredientDetail: Modal component that displays detailed information about a skincare ingredient, including safety classification, description, suitable skin types, and concerns (acne, sensitivity, clogging) with color-coded badges and icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header navigation, app branding, and conditional menu items (Resources, Dashboard, Favorites, Journal, Ingredients, Product Checker) based on authentication status using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states, error handling for duplicate authentication, and query cache clearing on logout.
Button component that exports content to PDF using html2pdf.js library with configurable options for margins, quality, page breaks, and timestamped filename generation.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying skincare product details with price range, concerns (with icons), favorite toggle, optional compare checkbox, and product note modal trigger with visual indicators for existing notes and ratings.
frontend/src/components/ProductNoteModal: Modal dialog for adding/editing product notes with star rating (1-5), notes text area, and usage experience field, saving to backend via useAddProductNote mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProductRecommend: Displays personalized skincare product recommendations grouped by category (cleanser, serum, moisturizer, etc.), with selection functionality to compare up to 3 products and navigation to a comparison page.
frontend/src/components/ProductSearchBar: A search input component with autocomplete dropdown that fetches product suggestions as the user types, supports keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape), and triggers a callback when a product is selected.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name before using the app, preventing dismissal until the profile is saved via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
Displays progress metrics for skin concerns (acne, pigmentation, aging, dryness) with trend indicators (improvement/decline/stable) and visual badges showing changes over time.
frontend/src/components/Questionnaire.ts: A multi-step questionnaire component that collects user responses about skin characteristics, calculates skin type and concern levels based on answers, and saves the results before navigating to the dashboard.
frontend/src/components/ReminderCard.tsx: Shows a dismissible reminder card prompting users to retake the questionnaire if their last analysis was over 3 months ago, and displays seasonal skincare tips with local storage-based dismissal tracking.
frontend/src/components/ResultsDisplay.t: Displays user's skin type analysis results, including skin type description, concern levels with icons and badges, and product recommendations. Handles loading states and redirects to questionnaire if no results exist.
frontend/src/components/RoutineList.tsx: Renders a list of user's skincare routines with steps ordered by sequence and frequency. Provides delete functionality and shows empty state with call-to-action when no routines exist.
Displays tabbed SQL query examples (CREATE, INSERT, SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE, JOINs) with syntax highlighting and copy-to-clipboard functionality. Provides educational context for each SQL operation type.
frontend/src/components/TrendChart.tsx: Renders a simple progress bar visualization showing concern level trends with color-coded indicators for improvement, decline, or stable status.
frontend/src/components/UIScreenshotGall: Displays a gallery of UI screenshots with descriptions, key features, design elements, and annotations for each page. Maps page names to icons and presents design theme documentation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend actor, with loading states coordinated with actor availability.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using @dfinity/auth-client, managing identity state and delegation validation throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Comprehensive collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, skin type detection, product recommendations, ingredient analysis, progress metrics, routines, favorites, and product notes.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a professional healthcare-inspired color palette using emerald/teal tones for both light and dark modes, including semantic color tokens for UI components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up the React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/ComparisonPage.tsx: Displays a side-by-side comparison of 2-3 selected products using ComparisonTable component. Fetches comparison data via useCompareProducts hook and handles loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: User dashboard displaying analysis history, routines, progress tracking, and reminders. Shows statistics cards for analyses and favorites with navigation to related pages and export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/DBMSDocumentationPage: Renders comprehensive DBMS project documentation including ER diagrams, schema diagrams, SQL queries, UI screenshots, data flow diagrams, and connectivity code. Provides PDF export functionality via PDFExportButton.
frontend/src/pages/FavoritesPage.tsx: Displays user's favorited products by filtering product recommendations against saved favorites. Shows empty state when no favorites exist with prompt to add products.
frontend/src/pages/IngredientAnalysisPag: Simple wrapper page that renders the IngredientAnalysis component within an AuthGuard for authenticated access.
frontend/src/pages/IngredientDictionaryP: Searchable ingredient database page displaying all ingredients in a grid of IngredientCard components. Includes search filtering by ingredient name.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with hero section, product search bar, feature cards, and CTAs to start questionnaire or analyze ingredients. Showcases app capabilities and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/ProductJournalPage.ts: Displays a user's product journal with notes and ratings. Shows a list of product reviews with star ratings, notes, and experiences, or an empty state if no entries exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProductSuitabilityChe: Provides a product suitability checker with autocomplete suggestions for product names. Allows users to analyze products for safety and suitability with keyboard navigation and dropdown selection support.
frontend/src/pages/QuestionnairePage.tsx: Simple wrapper page that renders the Questionnaire component within an AuthGuard for authenticated access.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcesPage.tsx: Educational resources page with searchable articles organized by categories (skin types, concerns, ingredients, routines). Features tabbed navigation and filtered content display using ArticleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Simple wrapper page that renders the ResultsDisplay component within an AuthGuard for authenticated access.
frontend/src/pages/RoutineBuilderPage.ts: Interactive routine builder allowing users to create custom skincare routines by adding, reordering, and configuring product steps with frequency settings. Integrates with product recommendations and favorites data.
frontend/src/pages/RoutinesPage.tsx: Displays a list of user's saved skincare routines with a button to create new routines. Shows loading state and navigates to the routine builder.
Documentation file containing code examples for actor initialization, Internet Identity authentication flow, and React Query hooks for data fetching in the ICP/Dfinity environment.
frontend/src/utils/educationalContent.ts: Defines educational articles about skin types, concerns, ingredients, and routines, pulling content from skinTypeDescriptions and providing structured information for each skin type and common skincare topics.
frontend/src/utils/exportFormatter.ts: Generates HTML export reports for user skincare analysis data, including user profile, skin type analysis, product recommendations, routines, favorites, and notes with print-friendly styling.
frontend/src/utils/questionnaireData.ts: Contains an array of 10 questions with descriptions and multiple-choice options for determining skin type and concerns through user questionnaire responses.
frontend/src/utils/seasonalTips.ts: Provides season-specific skincare tips (winter, spring, summer, fall) and a function to retrieve the appropriate tip based on the current date.
Defines comprehensive descriptions for each skin type (oily, dry, combination, sensitive, normal) including taglines, characteristics, care tips, and recommended ingredients.
frontend/src/utils/sqlExamples.ts: Contains SQL schema definitions and sample INSERT statements for the database structure including users, products, ingredients, routines, favorites, and analysis history tables.
frontend/src/utils/uiScreenshots.ts: Exports metadata describing UI pages (Landing, Questionnaire, Results, Dashboard, Favorites, Routines, Routine Builder, Product Journal) with their key features, design elements, and annotations for documentation or screenshot generation purposes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including typography, container settings, color system using OKLCH color space, font families, spacing, animations, and responsive breakpoints for the skincare platform UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting the cosmetic/skincare analysis platform architecture, including skin type detection, ingredient analysis, product suitability checking, and a comprehensive list of existing and planned features with their requirement IDs.
